playwright-qa-agent.description: Execute user stories via Playwright with PASS/FAIL reports

doc-updater.description: Analyze session and propose documentation updates

automation-scout.description: Detect repetitive patterns and suggest automations

learning-extractor.description: Extract learnings from session in TIL format

followup-suggester.description: Identify incomplete work and prioritize follow-ups

duplicate-checker.description: Check proposals for duplicates against existing docs
